mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, locker_type FROM UNTACT_BOOK_LOCKER_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY locker_number
SELECT locker_number, locker_type FROM UNTACT_BOOK_LOCKER_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT NVL(MAX(locker_number), 0) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_LOCKER_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_LOCKER_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND locker_type = '도서대출'

SELECT homepage_id, locker_use_yn, row_count, total_count, reservation_max_count, SUBSTR(loan_time,0,2) AS start_hour, SUBSTR(loan_time,4,2) AS start_minute, SUBSTR(loan_time,7,2) AS end_hour, SUBSTR(loan_time,10,2) AS end_minute, locker_use_type, vFromPhone, password_yn, sms_use_yn, rentalPlace FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.locker_use_yn = #{locker_use_yn}, a.row_count = #{row_count}, a.total_count = #{total_count}, a.reservation_max_count = #{reservation_max_count}, a.loan_time = #{start_hour}||':'||#{start_minute}||'~'||#{end_hour}||':'||#{end_minute}, a.locker_use_type = #{locker_use_type}, a.vFromPhone = #{vFromPhone}, a.password_yn = #{password_yn}, a.sms_use_yn = #{sms_use_yn}, a.rentalPlace = #{rentalPlace} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, locker_use_yn, row_count, total_count, reservation_max_count, loan_time, locker_use_type, vFromPhone, password_yn, sms_use_yn, rentalPlace ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{locker_use_yn}, #{row_count}, #{total_count}, #{reservation_max_count}, #{start_hour}||':'||#{start_minute}||'~'||#{end_hour}||':'||#{end_minute}, #{locker_use_type}, #{vFromPhone}, #{password_yn}, #{sms_use_yn}, #{rentalPlace} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24:MI') < TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(loan_time,0,2)||':'||SUBSTR(loan_time,4,2)) OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24:MI') > TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(loan_time,7,2)||':'||SUBSTR(loan_time,10,2)))
SELECT reservation_max_count FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT loan_time FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT locker_use_type FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT NVL(MAX(total_count),0) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
SELECT locker_use_yn FROM UNTACT_BOOK_SETTING WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
